objects.text: Detail-oriented Financial Analyst with over 6 years of experience in financial planning, analysis, and reporting. Proficient in leveraging data-driven insights to inform strategic decisions and optimize financial performance. Seeking to contribute analytical skills and financial expertise to the team at Hanover and Tyke.
Conducted detailed financial analysis and modeling to support strategic planning and investment decisions.
